summary: Iteration 189 — Revenue Analytics (backend + frontend) verified end-to-end. Backend pytest suite (existing 13 + new 9 extra tests) all pass with 1 skipped. Frontend /revenue-analytics renders both tabs with all 13 testids; group_by + time_filter dropdowns refetch correctly (this_month ₹5,376 → all_time ₹66,227 — reconciles exactly with Account-Performance net total). Custom date inputs reveal correctly. Compare tab shows Apr ₹0 vs May ₹5,376 = +₹5,376 +100% MoM with green delta card, grouped bar chart, and delta table. Sidebar 'Revenue Analytics' link under Dashboard submenu navigates correctly. Tenant Settings → Modules shows Revenue Analytics toggle; Tenant Settings → Roles → Reports category shows Revenue Analytics permission with view/create/edit/delete checkboxes.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/reports/revenue-analytics does NOT echo back time_filter / group_by in the response body (the compare endpoint already echoes period_a/period_b/group_by). Not blocking, but echoing them simplifies client cache invalidation + debugging.
top_n is hard-capped at 200 server-side via Pydantic; consider returning the applied top_n in the payload so the UI can show 'showing top N of M'.
RevenueAnalytics.js summary cards have label + value concatenated in textContent (e.g. 'Net Revenue₹5,376Gross ₹5,376') with no whitespace — purely a testing/A11y nit, visual layout is correct.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing 5 tenant-scoped invoices (Hyderabad ₹5,376 in May 2026; ₹66,227 net all-time).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in test_iteration_189_revenue_analytics.py (shape + math) and test_iteration_189_revenue_analytics_extra.py (time_filter enum coverage + AP reconciliation + sort order + zero-base delta_pct safety). Reconciliation key: sum(accounts[].net_invoice_total) from /api/reports/account-performance == revenue-analytics total_revenue at all_time. top_n is hard-capped at 200 (do not pass higher; returns 422). Endpoint does not echo time_filter back. Preview DB has only 5 tenant-scoped invoices — only Hyderabad appears under City grouping, which is expected per main agent's note.
